resiliation_modal_resiliate_service_term: Your service will be terminated on {{expirationDate}}, at the end of the current billing period.
Your service will be terminated immediately and you will no longer be charged for this service.
Your service will remain active and you will be charged until the end of your commitment on {{commitmentEndDate}}.
resiliation_modal_resiliate_service_dele: Your service will be terminated immediately. However, you will still be charged monthly fees for this service until the end of your commitment on {{commitmentEndDate}}.
resiliation_modal_resiliate_service_term: After the end of your commitment, you will be charged month by month until you terminate your service.
